name: electro-ball
effect_description: Inflicts regular damage.  The greater the user’s Speed compared to the target’s, the higher power this move has, to a maximum of 150.  User’s Speed                     | Power -------------------------------- | ----: Up to 2× the target’s Speed      |    60 Up to 3× the target’s Speed      |    80 Up to 4× the target’s Speed      |   120 More than 4× the target’s Speed  |   150
